response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified video content: 3D concert performance by virtual idols Towa and Roboco.
2. Scene 1 (00:00-03:07): Identified song 'Snooze' via on-screen text. Lyrics/Music by wotaku.
3. Performed search for 'Snooze': "Snooze" wotaku Japanese and English lyrics.
4. Scene 2 (03:07-04:59): Identified song 'Igaku' via on-screen text. Lyrics/Music by Sasuke Haraguchi.
5. Performed search for 'Igaku': "Igaku" Sasuke Haraguchi Japanese and English lyrics.
6. Compiled scene list and lyrics for final JSON.
response.global_summary: A 3D concert performance featuring two virtual idols (Towa and Roboco) performing a medley of two songs: 'Snooze' and 'Igaku'.

scenes.description: Virtual idols perform the song 'Snooze' by wotaku. Text identifying the song appears in the bottom-left at 00:07.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
排気に酔ったケーデンス
もう嫌なこと全部投げ出して
斯く濁った正義を疑って
あなたの話は退屈で
黒い欲望の所為だ
僕はただの傍観者、ただの目撃者
どこにも見当たらなくて
眠っていた
壊れて泣いている夢を診察した
次の期に
嘘に乾杯、終わりに乾杯
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Cadence drunk in pollution
Let's abandon everything you hate
And question the murky justice
Your stories are boring
Because of dark desires
I'm just a bystander, just a witness
I couldn't find it anywhere
So I was sleeping
I examined dreams, who were broken and crying
In the next term
Cheers to lies, cheers to the end

scenes.description: Virtual idols perform the song 'Igaku' (Medicine) by Sasuke Haraguchi. Text identifying the song appears in the bottom-left at 03:11.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ドクター・キドリです
愛・爆破ッテロ
簡単になれば
埋まった　マター　マター
ドクター・キドリです
愛想良いかも
朦朧　オオトも
埋めた　メタ　メタ
どこにも見当たらなくて
眠っていた
壊れて泣いている君を診察した
次の期に
嘘に乾杯、終わりに乾杯
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Yu) I'm Dr. Pretender
Here to bomb you with love
If it's something that simple
It's been buried, matter, matter
I'm Dr. Pretender
Maybe I'm friendly
Oboro, Ooto too
Buried, meta, meta
(Yu) I couldn't find it anywhere
So I was sleeping
I examined you, who was broken and crying
In the next term
Cheers to lies, cheers to the end
